LanguageData.HediffDef.Eternal_Essence.label: Eternal Essence
LanguageData.HediffDef.Eternal_Essence.description: The biological essence that enables eternal regeneration.
LanguageData.HediffDef.Eternal_RegrowthState.label: Regenerating
LanguageData.HediffDef.Eternal_RegrowthState.descript: This pawn's body is regenerating following the Eternal sequence.
LanguageData.HediffDef.Eternal_Regrowing_Neck.label: Regrowing Neck
LanguageData.HediffDef.Eternal_Regrowing_Neck.descrip: The neck is regenerating, reconnecting the head to the torso.
LanguageData.HediffDef.Eternal_Regrowing_HeadSkull.de: The head and skull are regenerating, providing protection for the brain.
LanguageData.HediffDef.Eternal_Regrowing_Brain.label: Regrowing Brain
LanguageData.HediffDef.Eternal_Regrowing_Brain.descri: The brain is regenerating, restoring consciousness and neural function.
LanguageData.HediffDef.Eternal_Regrowing_FacialSensor: Facial features and sensory organs are regenerating.
LanguageData.HediffDef.Eternal_RegrowthPaused.label: Regrowth Paused
LanguageData.HediffDef.Eternal_RegrowthPaused.descrip: Regrowth is paused due to insufficient resources.
Recovering from teleportation after death in caravan.
